五分快3单双.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239100516_64205115<br>vk.com/topic-239100481_65523495<br>vk.com/topic-239100519_64643538<br>vk.com/topic-239100479_64643534<br>vk.com/topic-239100474_63870411<br>vk.com/topic-239100514_63870410<br>vk.com/topic-239100484_63870413<br>vk.com/topic-239100486_64205118<br>vk.com/topic-239100907_65318237<br>vk.com/topic-239100473_64060651<br>vk.com/topic-239100522_64484143<br>vk.com/topic-239100521_65523513<br>vk.com/topic-239100464_63870416<br>vk.com/topic-239100515_63786692<br>vk.com/topic-239100477_65318251<br>vk.com/topic-239100455_63786693<br>vk.com/topic-239100462_64484144<br>vk.com/topic-239100456_64205134<br>vk.com/topic-239100463_64060711<br>vk.com/topic-239100510_64946269<br>vk.com/topic-239100511_65523533<br>vk.com/topic-239100471_65523536<br>vk.com/topic-239100475_63786666<br>vk.com/topic-239100531_65523543<br>vk.com/topic-239100478_64374299<br>vk.com/topic-239100466_64205085<br>vk.com/topic-239100485_63786715<br>vk.com/topic-239100533_64060736<br>vk.com/topic-239100532_64484191<br>vk.com/topic-239100525_63786744<br>vk.com/topic-239079436_64205204<br>vk.com/topic-239100460_64946368<br>vk.com/topic-239100560_64946372<br>vk.com/topic
